_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: pre-commit-ci[bot]
data.message:
[pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate (#1)

<!--pre-commit.ci start-->
updates:
- [github.com/codespell-project/codespell: v2.2.2 →
v2.2.4](https://github.com/codespell-project/codespell/compare/v2.2.2...v2.2.4)
- [github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-clang-format: v13.0.1 →
v16.0.0](https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-clang-format/compare/v13.0.1...v16.0.0)
<!--pre-commit.ci end-->

Co-authored-by: pre-commit-ci[bot] <66853113+pre-commit-ci[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,8 +19,8 @@ repos:
   - id: codespell
     args:
     - --write-changes
-  rev: v2.2.2
+  rev: v2.2.4
 - repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/mirrors-clang-format
   hooks:
   - id: clang-format
-  rev: v13.0.1
+  rev: v16.0.0

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# polygon_ros
+Messages and libraries for operating on two dimensional polygons.

data.author: Aposhian
data.message:
feat: close polygon visualization (#16)

If the first and last points of the polygon are not equal for a line
strip type visualization, add the first point to the end.

Addresses #15
